title: neesia altissima
intro: Neesia altissima, also known as the tall neesia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neesia altissima include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is commonly used in traditional medicine practices in various Asian cultures.
